title: Happy Ghast: Upgrade Snowballs
description: Upgrade Snowballs for your happy ghast!
body:
![LogoWithShiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dee225f32fdbefe41313e9c6c637e3256e5b15a.png)

Happy Ghast: Upgrade Snowballs is a mod that introduces a complete **upgrade system for the Happy Ghast**. It adds multiple classes of snowballs such as **Copper, Diamond, ..**. and more, each **improving the Ghast’s flight speed** and control. These upgrades allow players to fine-tune how fast and agile their Happy Ghast can move while maintaining full balance and responsiveness.

Beyond speed enhancements, several special upgrades provide **unique effects while riding**. Some **grant Night Vision** or **Slow Falling**, while others transform the Happy Ghast into a **devastating Siege Machine** capable of **igniting nearby TNT**. Together, these upgrades turn the Happy Ghast into a powerful and customizable companion for both travel and battle.

### Bugreports/Feedback
[If you spot a bug or have any suggestions, feel free to share your feedback with me here.](https://forms.gle/u3tsDGznMtmRKTBZ6)
